Localization.Name: Quell Suppressor1
Localization.Description:
Manufacturer: ArmaMod
Type: Suppressor
Attachment Point: Barrel
Size: 1

Heat: +10%
Spread: -25%
Aim Recoil: -25%
Visual Recoil: -25%
Fire Rate: -5%
Audible Range: -33%

The Quell Suppressor1 utilizes an advanced carbon polymer that reduces both noise and recoil at the cost of increased heat build-up.
